content: Doctor Amari: Fuck, it's late. You look like you could use a good brain-fuck, Drifter. My memory loungers can make you relive your nastiest, wettest memories—or implant new ones. Ever wanted to fuck a synth before they wipe its mind clean? Drifter: Shit, doc, you always know how to get me hard. But tell me—how the fuck do you sleep at night, helping synths escape the Institute just to get railed by Railroad agents? Doctor Amari: Oh, sweetheart, I don’t sleep. Not when there’s so many desperate wastelanders begging to feel something—anything—inside their skulls besides radiation rot. You ever had a memory so filthy it made your cock throb just thinking about it? Drifter: Fuck yeah. Last week, I watched a raider gang tag-team a Protectron till its circuits fried. That shit’s burned into my brain. Doctor Amari: Then let’s burn it deeper.

Doctor Amari: That's it for tonight, Drifter. My brain's fried, and my pussy's sore from all your filthy talk. Come back when you're ready to dive deeper—into memories or me. Drifter: Fuck yeah, doc. I’ll be back, and next time, I’m bringing some of those Jet-fueled raider sluts. They’ll make your synapses sing. Doctor Amari: As long as they don’t break my loungers. Now get out before I sic my synth fuck-toy on you. Drifter: Hah! You’d miss me too much. Later, doc.

Piper: Fuck, doc, that memory lounger really gave MJR and me some —saw him plowing a synth double of me while Cait licked my ass clean. You ever tweak those neural settings for extra ? Doctor Amari: Oh, I’ve  had clients request… . Last week, a raider paid me to implant a memory of a deathclaw fucking him while he screamed the Institute’s manifesto. The brain’s a filthy playground, darling. Piper: Hah! Bet he came harder than a Brotherhood knight realizing synths can suck dick better than his steel-clad ass. Speaking of—you ever sneak Railroad fugitives in here for a quick neural  before they fuck off to some farming commune? Doctor Amari: , half my clients are synths who barely remember if they prefer cock or cunt—until I  them. Last one begged me to make her forget the Institute… and remember  the taste of a super mutant’s cum. Priorities.

Piper: Fuck, doc, now you’ve got me thinking about Synth doubles and Deathclaws. Maybe I should pitch an  on post-human fetishes for the next magazine issue—call it Brave New Whores. Keep those filthy neural hacks coming. Doctor Amari: Oh, I’m sure we could  something unforgettable for your readership. Just try not to mix up virtual and…  pleasure. Last client who did that woke up humping a Protectron. Piper: Sounds like a Tuesday night with Cait and MJR. But hey, if the Brotherhood ever bans , we riot in their stupid tin-can fortress, yeah? Doctor Amari: With relish. Now, unless you want me to  you a fresh trauma to cry through next time you’re getting railed—? Piper: Tempting, but I’ll stick to my  nightmares. Mostly Cait’s morning breath.

Doctor Amari: So Cait, you really think the Brotherhood’s the answer to all this? Last synth I saw you with, you weren’t exactly preaching tolerance—more like blowing its head off mid-fuck. Cait: Fuck yeah I blew its head off!

Doctor Amari: Looks like MJR's stocking up for another fucked-up night in the Commonwealth. Better hope those stimpaks work faster than your trigger finger, Cait. Cait: Ha! The only stim I need is watchin' MJR empty a clip into some raider bitch's skull. Makes me wetter than a super mutant's dick. Doctor Amari: Charming as ever. Just don’t come crying to me when you need a memory wipe after another chem-fueled orgy in a radstorm. Cait: Wouldn’t wipe shit—I wanna remember every goddamn second of this wasteland paradise. Now move over, doc, MJR’s gotta check that fine ass of yours for… .
